node.statement: (Face-Commutant Correspondence — Alfsen-Shultz). Let A be a unital *-algebra and φ ∈ S(A) a state with GNS triple (π_φ, H_φ, ξ_φ). Then the face F_{S(A)}(φ) generated by φ in the state space S(A) is affinely isomorphic to the set {T ∈ π_φ(A)'^+ : ⟨Tξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩ = 1} via the map T ↦ ω_T defined by ω_T(a) = ⟨π_φ(a)Tξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩. Consequently, dim(F_{S(A)}(φ)) = dim_R(π_φ(A)'^{sa}) - 1.
